tasks.subject: Task 0: Resolver + ScaleUnsatisfiableError
tasks.description:
Pure height->factor resolver (core/scale_resolver.py: HeightPlan + resolve_height_target) + ScaleUnsatisfiableError in core/errors.py. Full unit table.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "src/kinoforge/core/scale_resolver.py", "tests/core/test_scale_resolver.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_scale_resolver.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smallest sufficient factor + correct downscale_to", "source>=target => factor None; exact => downscale None", "undershoot raises ScaleUnsatisfiableError with context", "empty factors => ValueError"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: ffprobe_dims helper
tasks.description:
core/frames.py: _default_probe_run + ffprobe_dims((w,h) via ffprobe csv=s=x:p=0), injectable seam.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/frames.py", "tests/core/test_frames_dims.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_frames_dims.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns (w,h) from WxH output", "injectable run seam, no binary in unit test", "unparseable output raises FrameExtractionError"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: downscale_video_bytes helper
tasks.description:
pipeline/downscale.py: ffmpeg lanczos scale=-2:{h} stdin->stdout, even width, reuses core.frames._default_run.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/downscale.py", "tests/pipeline/test_downscale.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_downscale.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["argv contains scale=-2:{target}:flags=lanczos", "odd/non-positive target_h raises ValueError", "real ffmpeg: output height==target, width even"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Relax UpscaleConfig to accept height targets
tasks.description:
core/config.py: _validate_flashvsr_wiring guards non-4x check behind kind==factor; accept height. Docstring update.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_upscale_config_height.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_upscale_config_height.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flashvsr scale=1080p validates", "720p and 4x validate", "3x still raises ConfigError"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: UpscaleStage height-awareness
tasks.description:
pipeline/upscale.py: run() branches factor vs height; _run_height resolves factor + stashes meta[downscale_to]; local source uses resolver, remote single-factor decides from output_resolution. probe_dims seam. Engines never see kind=height.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/upscale.py", "tests/pipeline/test_upscale_stage_height.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_upscale_stage_height.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["factor path unchanged, no meta", "single-factor overshoot stashes downscale_to==requested", "exact output => no downscale_to", "undershoot raises ScaleUnsatisfiableError", "downscale-only skips engine, stashes downscale_to"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Materialize-boundary downscale wiring
tasks.description:
pipeline/materialize.py: finalize_upscaled_bytes(body, downscale_to). Wire orchestrator materialize block to call it before sink.publish; widen guard to file:// when downscale pending.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/materialize.py", "tests/pipeline/test_materialize.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_materialize.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["finalize downscales iff downscale_to set", "orchestrator calls finalize before sink.publish", "block reads file:// bytes when downscale pending"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Live FlashVSR height-target smoke + frame-QA
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE. Live flashvsr scale=1080p on 480p source; --no-reuse; RED scaffold committed before spend; preflight; poll GPU/cost; ffprobe height==1080; 5-frame contact-sheet QA; verify teardown via kinoforge list; log successful-generations.md.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/upscale-flashvsr-1080p.yaml", "tests/live/test_flashvsr_height_target_live.py", "successful-generations.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=height -of csv=p=0 <out>.mp4", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RED scaffold committed before spend", "preflight exit 0", "delivered mp4 height==1080 aspect preserved", "5-frame contact sheet QA'd high quality, verdict recorded", "kinoforge list clean + pod destroyed", "successful-generations.md entry added"], "modelTier": "standard", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "single", "requiresUserSpecification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: gzip provision script under RunPod env-size limit
tasks.description:
gzip base64 provision script in _create_pod so total env stays under RunPod's ~101KB create limit (was 500ing at 101,971 bytes). dockerArgs base64 -d | gzip -d.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_provision_script.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/providers/test_runpod_provision_script.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["env value = base64(gzip(script)) round-trips", "dockerArgs uses base64 -d | gzip -d", "large script encodes <half plain-base64 size", "existing provider tests green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
